codeActions.title: Sort Tailwind CSS classes (Headwind order)
codeActions.description: Reorders Tailwind utility classes following the recommended Headwind/Prettier-plugin-tailwindcss sort order for consistency.

codeActions.title: Extract classes to @apply component
codeActions.description: Extracts selected Tailwind utility classes into a reusable CSS component using @apply directive.

codeActions.title: Convert arbitrary value to theme config
codeActions.description: Converts an arbitrary value like `bg-[#1da1f2]` or `w-[200px]` to a named theme value in tailwind.config.js.

codeActions.title: Group responsive variants
codeActions.description: Groups utility classes by responsive breakpoint prefix (sm:, md:, lg:, xl:, 2xl:) for better readability.

codeActions.title: Remove duplicate Tailwind classes
codeActions.description: Detects and removes duplicate utility classes within a class attribute.

codeActions.title: Convert @apply to inline utilities
codeActions.description: Replaces an @apply rule with the individual utility classes inlined directly in the HTML class attribute.

codeActions.title: Convert inline utilities to @apply
codeActions.description: Extracts inline Tailwind utility classes from a class attribute into a new CSS rule using @apply.

codeActions.title: Wrap in responsive variant
codeActions.description: Wraps selected utility classes with a responsive breakpoint prefix (sm:, md:, lg:, xl:, 2xl:).

codeActions.title: Add dark mode variant
codeActions.description: Adds dark: prefix to selected utility classes for dark mode support.

codeActions.title: Convert to arbitrary value
codeActions.description: Converts a standard utility value to an arbitrary value notation, e.g. `p-4` to `p-[1rem]`.
